channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Southern California chemical tank at risk of explosion as 40,000 residents ordered to evacuate
item.description: Authorities are preparing for the possibility that a damaged chemical tank at a Southern California facility could leak or explode.

item.title: Officials say efforts to stop California chemical leak in Orange County are taking a new direction
item.description: Over 50,000 people in California remain evacuated due to an Orange County chemical leak that led Governor Gavin Newsom to declare an emergency.

item.title: Wedding ring recovered after Simi Valley fire
item.description: With help from the Los Angeles Fire Department, Randy and Beth Boyle retrieved a wedding ring after their home was destroyed in the Simi Valley fire.

item.title: Spearfisher killed in Australia's second fatal shark attack in a week
item.description: A spearfisher was killed on the Great Barrier Reef in Australia's second fatal shark attack in just over a week.
